Table	Create Table
drillCustomizations	CREATE TABLE `drillCustomizations` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `drillId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `thumbnailUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `briefDescription` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `difficulty` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `category` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedBy` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `imageBase64` longtext DEFAULT NULL,
  `imageMimeType` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `drillId` (`drillId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
